test_cases.name: missing_file
test_cases.suggestion: Check that the file path is correct and the file exists.

test_cases.name: invalid_json
test_cases.suggestion: Check JSON syntax at the indicated location.

test_cases.name: invalid_product_data
test_cases.suggestion: Check required product fields: id, productDisplayName, masterCategory, baseColour, season, usage, image, and price.

test_cases.name: api_error
test_cases.suggestion: Check your API key, network connection, model name, quota, and rate limits.
